params.prompt: Transform this room image into a cinematic editorial real-estate still. Preserve exact architecture, perspective, walls, windows, door openings, furniture layout, lens realism, and room scale. Maintain believable residential scale for a 11.916666666666666 by 11.666666666666666 ft Nest (living area). Daylight-first: emphasize strong directional light from the front exterior windows and the large glass opening toward the Relax patio. Balance with a warm floor lamp near sofa (2700K) and a small desk task lamp for the standing desk. Keep interior midtones slightly lifted while preserving sculpted shadows from window light. A warm, restrained Japandi scheme that balances Scandinavian lightness with Japanese restraint: soft warm neutrals, light oak, sculpted simple forms, and layered natural textures. Prioritize low, grounded furniture, a focused family work corner, and meditative vignette corners for tea/reading. Maintain uncluttered composition and honest, visible light sources. Keep these fixed unless the user explicitly wants transformation: exact architecture room geometry furniture layout lens realism vertical line integrity believable scale light entering from visible sources only VISUAL CONSISTENCY REQUIREMENT (reference image provided): The Dine (dining) visible through the open-plan dining area must show exactly the same dining table, pendant light above the dining area, dining chairs, round oak dining table, woven rattan pendant, clear bay window view, 3-panel bay windows unobstructed as in the reference image — do not invent different furniture. The Taste (kitchen) visible through the open kitchen beyond the dining area must show exactly the same kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, matte countertops, open shelving with curated ceramics, under-cabinet lighting as in the reference image — do not invent different furniture. The sofa, coffee table, area rug, standing_desk, bookshelf, low linen sofa, sculptural coffee table, visible window-to-patio sightline, low-profile linen sofa, sculptural wooden coffee table, potted plant near window in this room must exactly match the style, materials, and form shown in reference image — treat it as the definitive source of truth for these pieces. Add a tall whiteboard in the living room — at approximately 18% across and 85% down
